series_metadata.series_description: Part of the Civil Service Application - A perforated attachment that is to be separated from the Civil Service Application when submitted. This record is a request for biographical data about the applicant.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 week after scanned into (UDS) Universal Document Service for quality purposes then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in (UDS) Universal Document Service for 2 years from the date of entry then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
